info.title: ref-db-download
info.description: A tool for downloading referenced database projects in deployment pipelines.

options.name: --project
options.description: The .sqlproj file containing the NuGet database references to download

options.name: --outputDirectory
options.description: The output directory for the downloaded DACPAC files

options.name: --include
options.description:
An optional list of additional NuGet packages to download and extract DACPAC files from. The
format of each package is ID <package>:<version>, for example: --include Microsoft.SqlServer.Dacpacs.Master:160.2.3.
You can specify multiple packages by separating them with a space, or by repeating the option.
